nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Origma
nodes.summary: Origma（Origma）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Mountain mouse-warbler、Rusty mouse-warbler、Rockwarbler。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 巴布亚新几内亚
nodes.summary: 巴布亚新几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联71种鸟类，包括白腹麻鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、Shining bronze cuckoo等71种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rusty mouse-warbler
nodes.summary: The rusty mouse-warbler (Origma murina), is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found in Indonesia and Papua New Guinea, in a 1,270,000 km² distribution. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. This species was formerly placed in the genus Crateroscelis, but following the publication of a molecular phylogenetic study of the scrubwrens and mouse-warblers in 2018, it was moved to the genus Origma. References
